INSERT INTO CleanClaims (
  MailingListID, EmployeeName, AddressChange, 
  Address1, Address2, City, State, Zip, 
  Country, Email, HomePhone, Passcode, 
  DateSignedOnline, DateReceived, 
  ESign, ConfirmationNo, SSNProvidedByCM, 
  EINProvidedByCM, ClaimNo, EnteredBy, 
  DateEntered, LateClaim, ClaimFiledOnline, 
  IPAdd
) 
Select 
  ID, 
  EmployeeName, 
  AddressChange, 
  Address1, 
  Address2, 
  City, 
  State, 
  Zip, 
  Country, 
  Email, 
  HomePhone, 
  Passcode, 
  DateSignedOnline, 
  DateReceived, 
  ESign, 
  ConfirmationNo, 
  SSNProvidedByCM, 
  EINProvidedByCM, 
  ClaimNo, 
  'cGary' AS xEnteredby, 
  GETDATE() AS Expr1, 
  IIf(
    [DateReceived] > '10/18/2024 23:59:59', 
    'True', 'False'
  ) AS xReceived, 
  'True' as xClaimFiledOnline, 
  IPAdd
FROM 
  OCPEmployees (nolock)

SET 
    cc.CA_FullName = cm.CA_FullName,
    cc.CA_Address1 = cm.CA_Address1,
	cc.CA_Address2 = cm.CA_Address2,
	cc.CA_City = cm.CA_City,
	cc.CA_State = cm.CA_State,
	cc.CA_Zip = cm.CA_Zip,
	cc.CA_ESign = cm.CA_ESign,
	cc.CA_DateSignedOnline = cm.CA_DateSignedOnline,
	cc.CA_PrintedSign = cm.CA_PrintedSign,
	cc.CA_DateReceived = cm.CA_DateReceived,
	cc.LastFourSSN = cm.LastFourSSN,
	cc.CA_Email = cm.CA_Email,
	cc.CA_ConfirmationNo = cm.CA_ConfirmationNo,
	cc.CA_EmailSent = cm.CA_EmailSent,
	cc.CA_CertifyUnderPrejury = cm.CA_CertifyUnderPrejury,
	cc.CA_IPAddress = cm.CA_IPAddress,

    notes = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(CAST(CleanClaims.Notes AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') = ''
        THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 101) + ' (VO) Auto-validated for Lost Time.'
        ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 101) + ' (VO) Auto-validated for Lost Time. - ' + CAST(Notes AS VARCHAR(MAX))
        END
WHERE (LostTime_Attestation = 1)
AND EligibilityA2 = 0
AND ValidClaim = 0

BEGIN TRY
    BEGIN TRANSACTION;

    UPDATE CleanClaims
    SET 
        ValidClaim = 1,
        ValidAlternativeCashPayment = 1,
        Notes = CAST(
            ISNULL(CAST(Notes AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), '') + 
            CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + 
            FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'MM/dd/yyyy') + ': (VO) Validated for Alt Cash Payment.'
        AS NTEXT)
    WHERE 
        ValidClaim = 0 AND
        Invalid = 0 AND
        IsAlternativeCashPayment = 1 AND
        IsCreditMonitoring = 0 AND
        IsExtraordinaryLoss = 0 AND
        IsOrdinaryLoss = 0 AND
        ClaimFiledOnline = 1;

    COMMIT;
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
    ROLLBACK;
    -- Optional: Raise the error for logging or debugging
    THROW;
END CATCH;

BEGIN TRANSACTION;

UPDATE CleanClaims
SET
    ValidClaim = 1,
    Notes = CAST(ISNULL(Notes, '') AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) + ' ' +
            FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'MM/dd/yyyy') + ' (KT) Auto-Validated for Alternative Cash Payment'
WHERE
    hasFlatCash = 1
    AND (Amount1 IS NULL OR Amount1 = 0)
    AND ValidClaim = 0
	AND ClaimFiledOnline = 1;

IF @@ERROR = 0
BEGIN
    COMMIT TRANSACTION;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
END
column27:

UPDATE CleanClaims

    ISNULL(AmountVerified1, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified2, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified3, 0) +
    ISNULL(AmountVerified4, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified5, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified6, 0) +
    ISNULL(AmountVerified7, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified8, 0) + ISNULL(AmountVerified9, 0) +
    ISNULL(AmountVerified10, 0)
WHERE TotalAmountVerified IS NULL;

IF @@ERROR = 0
BEGIN
    COMMIT TRANSACTION;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
END

BEGIN TRY
    BEGIN TRANSACTION;

    -- Update for Lost Time claims
    UPDATE CleanClaims
    SET 
        ValidClaim = 1, 
        ValidLostTime = 1, 
        Notes = CONVERT(nvarchar(MAX), GETDATE(), 120) + ' (KT) Validated for Lost Time. ' + ISNULL(Notes, '') 
    WHERE 
        ClaimFiledOnline = 1 
        AND ValidClaim = 0 
        AND Invalid = 0 
        AND Deficient = 0 
        AND hasOrdinaryExpenses = 0 
        AND hasLostTime = 1 
        AND hasAltCashPayment = 0;

    -- Update for Alternative Cash Payment claims
    UPDATE CleanClaims
    SET 
        ValidClaim = 1,
        ValidAltCashPayment = 1,
        Notes = CONVERT(nvarchar(MAX), GETDATE(), 120) + ' (KT) Validated for Alternative Cash Payment. ' + ISNULL(Notes, '')
    WHERE 
        ClaimFiledOnline = 1 AND
        Invalid = 0 AND
        Deficient = 0 AND
        ValidClaim = 0 AND
        hasOrdinaryExpenses = 0 AND
        hasLostTime = 0 AND
        hasAltCashPayment = 1;

    COMMIT TRANSACTION;
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
    ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

    -- Optional: Raise the error for debugging/logging
    THROW;
END CATCH;

UPDATE CleanClaims
SET ValidClaim = 1,
Notes = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'MM/dd/yyyy') + ' (VO) Auto Validated for CA Class Member.' +
            CASE 
                WHEN Notes IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(Notes)) <> '' 
                THEN ' - ' + Notes 
                ELSE '' 
            END
WHERE 
	ClaimFiledOnline = 1 and 
    ValidClaim = 0 AND
    InValid = 0 AND
    IsLegallyBlind = 1 AND
    hasVisitedSite = 1 AND
    unabletoFindStore = 1  AND
    (stateLivedin = 'CA' OR stateLivedin = 'California');

column12: Update OCPEmployees Set [Delete] = 'True' From ( Select ClaimNo, ClaimFiledOnline From cleanclaims) b Where b.ClaimNo = OCPEmployees.ClaimNo And b.ClaimFiledOnline = 1
column15:
INSERT INTO CleanClaims (
 MailingListID , ClaimNo , DateReceived , AddressChange , Address1 , Address2 , City , State , Zip , HomePhone , Email , ConfirmationNo , ESign , DateSignedOnline , Passcode , EmployeeName , IpAddress , Ssn ,
 EnteredBy, DateEntered, LateClaim, ClaimFiledOnline 
 ) Select 
 ID , ClaimNo , DateReceived , AddressChange , Address1 , Address2 , City , State , Zip , HomePhone , Email , ConfirmationNo , ESign , DateSignedOnline , Passcode , EmployeeName , IpAddress , Ssn ,
'cGary' AS xEnteredby,GETDATE() AS Expr1,IIf([DateReceived] > '11/10/2026 23:59:59','True','False') AS xReceived,'True' as xClaimFiledOnline 
FROM OCPEmployees
column17: Update MailingList Set Address1 = b.Address1,Address2 = b.Address2,City = b.City,State = b.State,Zip = b.Zip From (Select ID,Address1,Address2,City,State,Zip From OCPEmployees Where addressChange = 'True') b Where b.ID = MailingList.ID

column2: Palazuelos v. HSGI, Inc.
column6: Select * From ClassMembers where DateReceived is not null
column7:
IF (EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'dbo' AND  TABLE_NAME = 'ClassMembers'))
BEGIN

	DROP TABLE ClassMembers 

END

select * INTO ClassMembers  FROM openquery([10.0.0.5],'SELECT * FROM [HSGI_Palazuelos_C].[dbo].[ClassMembers] WHERE DateReceived IS NOT NULL');
column8:
IF (EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'dbo' AND  TABLE_NAME = 'OCPEmployees'))
BEGIN

	DROP TABLE OCPEmployees 

END

select *, (ID + 1000000) AS ClaimNo, CAST(0 AS bit) AS [Delete] INTO OCPEmployees FROM ClassMembers;
